name: AI SaaS Platform
description: A full-stack AI-powered SaaS platform built with Next.js, Prisma, Pinecone vector database, and LangChain. The platform provides RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) capabilities for intelligent document processing and conversational AI interfaces.

name: Hierarchical Probabilistic Demand Sensing and Forecasting with External Signal Fusion
description: A hierarchical Bayesian forecasting system that fuses real-time internal signals (inventory velocity, search trends, cart abandonment) with external data (weather, events, macroeconomic indicators) to produce probabilistic demand predictions at SKU, store, and regional levels. It continuously adapts to market shifts, dynamically self-correcting to optimize inventory allocation, pricing, and promotions while minimizing stockouts and overstock costs.

name: Data-Scarce Regression with SMOGN and Joint Hyperparameter Optimization
description: A hybrid framework combining SMOGN for synthetic data generation in sparse target regions with joint hyperparameter optimization (e.g., Optuna) that simultaneously tunes augmentation and model parameters. This integrated approach captures complex feature-target relationships more effectively than sequential tuning, improving predictive accuracy in data-limited settings. The framework is adaptable across domains like healthcare, finance, and sports analytics where rare but critical outcomes are underrepresented

name: What-If Analytics Engine using Causal AI
description: A causal AI engine that simulates hypothetical interventions (price changes, promotions, product launches) on business metrics using DAGs and double machine learning. It provides counterfactual estimates with confidence intervals—unlike correlation-based models—enabling teams to test strategies in silico before committing resources. Integrated with real-time data pipelines and BI dashboards for on-demand decision support.

name: Obstacle Assault (3D Game)
description: An immersive 3D obstacle course game developed using Unreal Engine 5 with C++23. Features realistic physics, dynamic obstacles, and progressive difficulty levels.

name: Yobird & Treehouse Games
description: Two retro-style 2D games developed in Rust using the bracket-lib library. Showcases game development capabilities in systems programming language with focus on performance and memory safety.

name: OpenStreetMap Route Planner
description: A route planning application built with C++23 that leverages OpenStreetMap data to calculate optimal paths between locations using graph algorithms.

name: System Monitor
description: A cross-platform system monitoring tool developed in C++23 that provides real-time insights into CPU, memory, disk, and network usage with an intuitive dashboard interface.

name: Housing Application
description: A full-stack housing management application using React.js for the frontend, Node.js for the backend, and Google Firestore Database for real-time data synchronization.

name: React Native Quizzing App
description: A cross-platform quiz application built with React Native for both Android and iOS platforms. Features user authentication, real-time scoring, and multiple quiz categories.
